Headline: #119 Michigan/119th and #34 South Chicago Temporary Reroute near Michigan/116th
ShortDescription: 119 Michigan/119th and 34 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Michigan/116th due to street blockage near Michigan/116th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#119 Michigan/119th and #34 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Michigan/116th due to street blockage near Michigan/116th.

#34 South Chicago buses will operate via Michigan, 119th, State, 115th, Michigan and over regular route.

#119 Michigan/119th buses will operate via 119th, State, 115th, Michigan and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
